title: Render Dragon
description: A resource pack that makes the ender dragon into the render dragon
body:
Just a simple pun-based resource pack that makes the Ender Dragon, Endermen, Endermites, End Crystals, Ender Chests, Ender Pearls, and Eyes of Ender to neon green wireframe versions of themselves. 

Basically anything with Ender in the name.

It also changes the pink boss bar to a more fitting green one, as well as any names related to the changed entities or items.

![The Render Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/175c4315b73d85192e0cea402fa1f2004c118207_0.webp)
